cause_analysis.narrative: WaxC Skin Studio churned on 2026-02-02 after 394 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2025-12-11 (email) — first complaint keyword: "waiting for". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2025-12-11 via email. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
